reliable_fields.declarant_address: Plot No. 76, SBI Colony, Balaji Nagar, Totapalem area, near Srinivasa College, near Abdul Kalam Park, Vizianagaram

agent_findings.message: Affidavit liquid and fixed-deposit funds appear sufficient on paper, but a six-month statement is still required to prove maintained liquidity.
Tax return data is missing, so the declared affidavit income cannot yet be verified against official income records.
Applicant name appears as Korada SaiKiran and Korada Sai Kiran. Confirm spacing across passport, admission letter, and financial documents.

compound_flags: Affidavit income and asset claims are present, but tax return and bank statement corroboration are still missing.
Funds exist across multiple instruments; maintained liquidity must be proven month-by-month.
narrative_synthesis.synthesis_trace: The affidavit provides a plausible financial story, but an officer would ask whether the declared income and funds are externally corroborated by tax filings and bank statements.

next_steps.action: Upload the latest income tax return or computation of returns to establish tax-verified income.
Upload six months of bank statements for all declared savings accounts.
Upload bank balance certificates for fixed deposits and insurance-linked deposits.
Verify name spelling and spacing across affidavit, passport, and admission records.
